payload.description:
Feature: Project Timeline AI guidelines for Suco - Home Improvement

Scenario: Agent asks the project timeline with the required conditional phrasing and valid options
Given a transcript where the agent asks about start timing using the approved conditional phrasing and valid options
When the reviewer evaluates the conversation
Then the score should be Yes

Scenario: Customer gives the timeline proactively
Given a transcript where the customer clearly provides the timeline without needing the agent to list all valid options
When the reviewer evaluates the conversation
Then the score should be Yes

Scenario: Agent omits required phrasing, uses invalid options, fails to re-ask after intent changes, or leaves an unclear timeline unclarified
Given a transcript where one of those failures occurs
When the reviewer evaluates the conversation
Then the score should be No
payload.title: As a reviewer, I want Project Timeline AI guidelines that distinguish compliant timeline qualification from missing or invalid timeline handling, so that scoring is consistent
